introSection: Twin Spin is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Enchanted Kingdom in Santa Rosa, Laguna, Philippines.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: In each car, the two rows face away from each other.

fullText:
Twin Spin is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Enchanted Kingdom in Santa Rosa, Laguna, Philippines.



In each car, the two rows face away from each other.
